source.business_scenario: 普通 SELECT 触发 Row Adapter / Vector Adapter 切换
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, f.title, r.rental_date
FROM customer c
JOIN rental r ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id
JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
JOIN film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id
WHERE c.active = 1
LIMIT 20
